title: Test: Add contract testing for services
original_text: Added contract testing for microservices. Created service contracts using OpenAPI. Implemented contract verification for service communication. Added contract testing for API versioning. Implemented contract breaking change detection. Added contract documentation. Result: all contracts verified.
expected_subject: test(contracts): add contract testing for microservices
expected_body_lines: - Implement contract verification for service communication
- Add contract testing for API versioning
expected_command: git commit -m "test(contracts): add contract testing for microservices"
